     The Numbers Business Report

The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $102,515,793Details
International Box Office $136,858,177
Worldwide Box Office $239,373,970
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $25,661,346
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,234,214
Total $38,895,560
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo is the first film in Columbia Pictures' three-picture adaptation of Stieg Larsson's literary blockbuster The Millennium Trilogy. Directed by David Fincher and starring Daniel Craig and Rooney Mara, the film is based on the first novel in the trilogy, which altogether have sold 50 million copies in 46 countries and become a worldwide phenomenon.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,768,604 (12.5% of total gross)
Legs:6.92 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,914 opening theaters/2,950 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $154,317,393

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 20th, 2011 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: January 12th, 2012 (Wide) (Switzerland)
January 13th, 2012 (Wide) (Turkey)
January 27th, 2012 (Wide) (Brazil)
January 27th, 2012 (Wide) (Central America)
February 10th, 2012 (Wide) (Japan)
Video Release: March 20th, 2012 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for brutal violent content including rape and torture, strong sexuality, graphic nudity, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2199, 11/23/2011)
Running Time: 160 minutes
Franchise: Millennium (English)
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, News, Private Investigator, Revenge, Serial Killer, Sex Crimes, Surprise Twist, Writing and Writers
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Scott Rudin Productions, Yellow Bird
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo is the first film in Columbia Pictures' three-picture adaptation of Stieg Larsson's literary blockbuster The Millennium Trilogy. Directed by David Fincher and starring Daniel Craig and Rooney Mara, the film is based on the first novel in the trilogy, which altogether have sold 50 million copies in 46 countries and become a worldwide phenomenon.
